task_completion.visual_evidence: VeraCrypt GUI showing '/home/ga/Volumes/project_archive.hc' in the volume path field, or a terminal command targeting this volume path.

task_completion.description: Provide the password and select a candidate keyfile
task_completion.visual_evidence: VeraCrypt mount dialog showing password entry (asterisks) and the Keyfiles selection window open, navigating to '/home/ga/Documents/candidates/' to add a Python script.

task_completion.description: Successfully mount the volume to the specified slot
task_completion.visual_evidence: VeraCrypt main window showing the volume successfully mounted at '/home/ga/MountPoints/slot1', or a file manager/terminal open at this specific mount point.

task_completion.description: Extract the secret token to the Documents folder
task_completion.visual_evidence: File manager showing 'recovered_token.txt' in '/home/ga/Documents/', or a terminal/text editor showing the file being copied from the mount point to this destination.

task_completion.description: Save the name of the successful keyfile
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text editor or terminal showing the creation or contents of '/home/ga/Documents/correct_keyfile_name.txt' containing just a filename (e.g., ending in .py).

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually used VeraCrypt to mount the volume rather than hallucinating the outputs.
integrity.visual_evidence: VeraCrypt GUI windows or 'veracrypt' CLI commands visible in the screenshots.

integrity.description: Verify the agent accessed the mounted volume to retrieve the token.
integrity.visual_evidence: File manager or terminal explicitly showing the contents of '/home/ga/MountPoints/slot1' being read or copied.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the candidates directory to find the keyfile.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the agent listing, viewing, or selecting files from '/home/ga/Documents/candidates/'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target VeraCrypt volume is '/home/ga/Volumes/project_archive.hc'. Candidate keyfiles are located in '/home/ga/Documents/candidates'. The volume must be mounted to '/home/ga/MountPoints/slot1'. The extracted token must be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/recovered_token.txt' and the correct keyfile name to '/home/ga/Documents/correct_keyfile_name.txt'.
